# PERF-197 positive: io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body) called twice
lang: go
file: PERF-197-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	body2, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	_, _ = body
	_, _ = body2
}
